system.description:
Discipline: Neigong
Skill: Arm Strike against Parry
Type: Normal
Qi: 3

You drive your fingers deep into the victim’s flesh like roots and begin drawing out his vital energies. On a Success, your Attack does Damage equal to your Neigong Ranks + Muscle. You also heal one Wound if the Attack successfully inflicts Damage. On a Total Success, your fingers become lodged in the victim, and the Attack is considered to automatically hit on the next round as well. On a Failure, the Attack misses. This Technique can only be used safely by castrated males and is found in the Merciless Willow Manual. Non-castrated males can learn and attempt it, but they take 4 Wounds and they permanently lose 1 point of Hardiness after each use. Cathartic: On a Success, the Attack also deals 2 Extra Wounds, and you heal the amount of Wounds you inflict (up to a maximum of target’s Ranks in Qi). Additionally, if the target has fewer Qi Ranks than the attacker the drain of vital energies is so severe that the victim must roll Endurance against TN 8 or be rendered unable to use any Kung Fu Techniques for an hour.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.consequenceNote: Non-castrated males take 4 Wounds and permanently lose 1 Hardiness after each use.
system.accessNotes: This Technique can only be used safely by castrated males and is found in the Merciless Willow Manual.
system.requirementNotes: Can only be used safely by castrated males and is found in the Merciless Willow Manual.

Additionally, if the target has fewer Qi Ranks than the attacker the drain of vital energies is so severe that the victim must roll Endurance against TN 8 or be rendered unable to use any Kung Fu Techniques for an hour.
